{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/22666538?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/omkhar", "id": 22666538, "login": "omkhar", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjIyNjY2NTM4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54516", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-915", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes"}], "description": "## Summary
`POJOPropertiesCollector._renameProperties()` allows a property with `@JsonProperty("renamed")` on the getter and `@JsonIgnore` on the setter to be renamed rather than dropped. With `MapperFeature.INFER_PROPERTY_MUTATORS` enabled (default), the private backing field is retained; during deserialization `BeanDeserializerFactory.addBeanProps()` sees `hasField()==true`, builds a `FieldProperty`, and makes the backing field writable. An attacker supplying the renamed JSON key writes the backing field directly, bypassing the `@JsonIgnore` on the setter.

## Impact
POJOs combining a renamed getter with an ignored setter (a read-only-over-the-wire pattern) have that field silently set from attacker input (property tampering / mass assignment). Not a general gadget; no RCE.

## Affected / Patched (verified via `git tag --contains`)
- 2.21 line: `>= 2.21.0, < 2.21.4` -> fixed in **2.21.4** (backport `c3d56dd`, #5968)
- 3.x line: `>= 3.0.0, < 3.1.4` -> fixed in **3.1.4** (#5967, `e88cb17`)

## Severity / CWE
Maintainer: minor. Reporter: HIGH. CWE-915.

## Credits
Omkhar Arasaratnam (@omkhar) - finder.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00282, "percentile": 0.19951}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9fxm-vc8v-hj55", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T21:24:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9fxm-vc8v-hj55", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9fxm-vc8v-hj55"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54516"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-23T21:24:26Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/security/advisories/GHSA-9fxm-vc8v-hj55", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/pull/5967", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/pull/5968", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/commit/c3d56dd25d52319828147c5b9aeabf2d485c250a", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/commit/e88cb17006b6af4883b973058f0bb6486e5074af", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9fxm-vc8v-hj55"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FasterXML/jackson-databind/security-advisories/GHSA-9fxm-vc8v-hj55", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind", "summary": "jackson-databind's renamed @JsonIgnore'd setters can deserialize via private fields", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T21:24:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9fxm-vc8v-hj55", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.21.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.21.0, < 2.21.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.1.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.1.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.1.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "tools.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.1.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: jackson-databind's renamed @JsonIgnore'd setters can deserialize via private fields
